home.hero_title: Vehicle imports from <0>USA</0> to Honduras and Guatemala
home.hero_desc: Integrated and secure logistics solutions. We facilitate the path from auction to final destination with architectural precision.

features.trust_desc: Total transparency in every step of the process, from initial bid to key delivery.
features.security_desc: Rigorous cargo protection protocols and international insurance with full coverage for your investment.
features.efficiency_desc: Optimized transit times thanks to our network of strategic allies in key ports.

home.services_desc: We design a robust supply chain so you only worry about choosing your next vehicle.
home.auction_desc: Exclusive access to Copart and IAAI. We advise you to find the best market opportunities with full legal security.
home.shipping_desc: We coordinate ground transportation from any point in the US to our port warehouses.
home.maritime_desc: Alliances with major shipping lines to ensure space and competitive rates to Central America.
home.customs_desc: Precise and agile customs procedures to ensure your vehicle complies with all regulations.
home.license_desc: We put our commercial credentials at your disposal so you can operate directly in auctions.
home.mission_desc: Our mission is to provide cutting-edge logistics solutions that guarantee safety and efficiency in every import. We are dedicated to simplifying customs and transport processes, allowing our clients to grow without geographic barriers.
home.vision_desc: To be the undisputed leader in vehicle logistics for the US - Central America corridor, recognized for our technological innovation, absolute transparency, and a precision that defines new standards in the industry.
home.objective_desc: Facilitate international vehicle trade by reducing logistics barriers for our clients.
home.lead_desc: Complete the form and an expert advisor will contact you in less than 24 hours.
home.form_message_ph: Tell us about the vehicle you are looking for...
home.faq_desc: We resolve your doubts about the import process.
home.faq_q1: How long does the full process take?
home.faq_a1: The estimated time is 3 to 5 weeks, depending on the vehicle's location in the US and the availability of shipping space.
home.faq_q2: Can I buy at auctions if I am not a company?
home.faq_a2: Yes, through our license rental service, you can access Copart and IAAI as a professional buyer.
home.faq_q3: What documents do I need to import to Honduras?
home.faq_a3: You will need the original vehicle title, bill of sale, and your personal ID (RTN).

services.hero_desc: Global transport architecture designed for efficient vehicle imports from US auctions to Honduras and Guatemala.
services.title: Comprehensive Solutions
services.auction_desc: Full access to the largest vehicle auction platforms in the United States. We provide professional bidding advice to ensure the best value for your investment.
services.pickup_desc: Coordinated ground logistics for the secure pickup of your unit from any auction yard or private address in the USA.
services.maritime_desc: Weekly shipments to Puerto Cortés (Honduras) and Santo Tomás de Castilla (Guatemala) with constant GPS monitoring.
services.customs_desc: We handle all customs documentation and import procedures to ensure a smooth entry.
services.license_desc: Use our dealer licenses to participate directly in auctions restricted to professionals, without complex procedures.
services.why_expertise_desc: Deep knowledge of international regulations and local import laws.
services.why_reach_desc: Established logistics network connecting major US ports with Central America.
services.why_transparency_desc: No hidden fees. Full visibility of costs and shipment status at every stage.
services.process_desc: Structured efficiency from purchase to final delivery.
services.step1_desc: Choose your vehicle on Copart or IAAI with our guidance.
services.step2_desc: We perform the bid and handle secure payment.
services.step5_desc: Pickup at port or coordinated delivery to your door.
services.cta_title: Ready to import your next vehicle?
services.cta_desc: Get a personalized consultation and a detailed quote without commitment.

about.hero_desc: Redefining vehicle transportation between the United States and Central America with architectural precision and unwavering commitment.
about.history_p1: Keyport Logistic Lines was born from a clear vision: to simplify the complexity of international vehicle trade. What began as an operation focused on regional logistics has evolved into a fundamental pillar for vehicle imports from the United States to Honduras and Guatemala.
about.history_p2: Under the leadership of experts like <0>Keylin Orellana</0>, our trajectory has been characterized by constant adaptation to global market changes. We have built a network that not only transports assets but also carries our clients' trust across maritime and land borders.
about.stats_network_desc: Connecting major US ports with Central America.
about.team_desc: The human talent behind Keyport's logistics precision.
about.ceo_desc: Visionary leader with over 15 years of experience in the international logistics sector, focused on cross-border process innovation.
about.ops_desc: Specialist in supply chain optimization and large-scale maritime fleet management.
about.spec_desc: Expert in Central American customs regulations and 'last mile' logistics coordination.
about.mission_desc: Our mission is to provide cutting-edge logistics solutions that guarantee safety and efficiency in every import. We are dedicated to simplifying customs and transport processes, allowing our clients to grow without geographic barriers.
about.vision_desc: To be the undisputed leader in vehicle logistics for the US - Central America corridor, recognized for our technological innovation, absolute transparency, and a precision that defines new standards in the industry.
about.values_desc: The pillars that sustain every operation at Keyport.
about.value1_desc: Real-time information and honest communication at every stage of your vehicle's journey.
about.value2_desc: Optimization of routes and times to ensure your assets reach their destination without unnecessary delays.
about.value3_desc: We understand that every shipment is unique. We tailor our logistics to your specific needs.
about.objectives_desc: Our roadmap towards global leadership in logistics.
about.obj1_desc: Total digitalization of customs documentation to reduce waiting times by 40%.
about.obj2_desc: Competitive price structures through direct alliances with shipping lines.
about.obj3_desc: Consolidation of new operational nodes in El Salvador and Nicaragua, redefining the regional logistics corridor by 2025.
about.obj4_desc: Integration of predictive systems and high-precision satellite monitoring for absolute traceability.
about.quote_text: "At Keyport, we don't just move vehicles; we move our clients' dreams and projects."
about.cta_title: Ready to move your fleet? Let's talk about precision.

contact.hero_title: Contact Us — We are ready to help.
contact.hero_desc: We carry your cargo with surgical precision and global responsibility. Let's talk about your next logistics operation.
contact.address_value: Bo. Centro, 2nd Ave, Plaza Santa Fé, Suite #4, Puerto Cortés, Honduras.
contact.form_desc: Complete the form and a logistics specialist will contact you in less than 24 hours.
contact.map_desc: Situated in the heart of Honduras' port activity for an immediate response to your import and export needs.

quote.hero_title: Request Your Quote - Transparency and Speed in Your Import
quote.hero_desc: We calculate exact costs for logistics, transport, and clearing so your vehicle arrives without surprises.
quote.guide_step1_desc: Name, email, and phone to send you the detailed quote.
quote.guide_step2_desc: Technical specifications to calculate dimensions and weight.
quote.guide_step3_desc: Select the type of logistics management and the delivery country.
quote.help_box_desc: Speak directly with a logistics advisor for special cases.
quote.privacy_note: * By sending, you accept our privacy policies and logistics service terms.
quote.footer_secure_desc: Constant monitoring and legal contracts that protect your investment every mile.
quote.footer_response_desc: Our logistics team analyzes your case to deliver the best market cost.
quote.footer_tracking_desc: Access to our platform to see your vehicle's location in real-time.
